One app, two perspectives

Built for the coach.
Loved by the client.

CubeFit gives trainers a full operations toolkit and gives their clients a beautiful, lightweight space to log and learn — no two-product rollout, no separate dashboards.

For the coach

Run your studio from your pocket.

Onboard clients, program workouts, write diet plans, and book sessions — without spreadsheets, WhatsApp threads, or a desk.

  • ✓Client roster with at-a-glance status
  • ✓Session scheduler with auto-notify
  • ✓Meal & workout plan builder
  • ✓Subscription billing & analytics
For the client

Every plan, every win — in one place.

Clients see today's workout, this week's meal plan, and their weight journey on a single screen. Streaks keep them showing up.

  • ✓Personal workout & diet feed
  • ✓Daily weight log + history graph
  • ✓Streak counter & gentle nudges
  • ✓Direct messaging with their coach
Coach dashboard

Your whole roster, one tap away.

Open CubeFit and see exactly where every client stands — active count, what's next on your calendar, and the quick actions to push your day forward.

  • Live client count See every active client and their last activity without leaving the home screen.
  • Up-next queue Tomorrow's sessions, this afternoon's check-ins — surfaced before you have to think about them.
  • Quick actions Schedule, bill, or jump into a client profile in one tap from the dashboard.
Status
4 active clients
Next session
Today, 18:35
Session scheduler

Book a session. Notify the client. Done.

Pick the client, the time, the duration — CubeFit handles the calendar invite, the reminder, and the push notification. No more "did we say 6 or 6:30?" texts.

  • Auto-notify on book "Schedule + Notify" sends the client a push notification with the session details the moment you confirm.
  • Custom duration 15, 30, 60, 90 minutes — or whatever you charge for. Save defaults per client.
  • Client picker One-tap roster scroll. Recurring clients sit at the top.
Client notified
Marin · 18:35
Meal library

A meal library that scales with your roster.

Build it once. Assign it forever. Every meal carries its calories, macros, ingredients, and category — so you can mix-and-match plans for each client in seconds.

  • Create or import Add a meal manually or import a CSV. The library deduplicates and tags for you.
  • Macros on every card Calories, protein, carbs, fats — calculated and displayed so swapping a meal in a plan stays on-target.
  • See who has what Each meal shows the number of clients assigned, so you know what's pulling weight in your roster.
Library size
30 meals · 4 categories
Veggie wrap
360 kcal · 12g protein
Meal plan composer

Auto-balance macros to hit any calorie target.

Set the daily calorie goal. Slide protein, carbs, and fats. CubeFit recalculates the others in real time so the math is always right — not approximately right.

  • Three live sliders Protein, carbs, fats — each with calorie totals and grams shown next to the handle.
  • Real-time totals Plan name, daily target, macro split — every change reflects instantly with no save-and-refresh dance.
  • Save as template Fat-loss, lean bulk, cut prep — save your favorite splits as reusable starting points.
Calorie target
2,500 kcal / day
Weight tracking

Log every kilogram. Watch the trend.

Clients log weight in two taps — pick the date, drop the number. CubeFit charts the trend, calculates moving averages, and shows you exactly where the plan is working.

  • kg or lbs Switch units per client. We convert and store the canonical value so your charts never break.
  • Backfill any date Missed a Monday? Pick the date and log it. The history graph reflects it without messing up the streak.
  • Streaks & nudges Daily streak counter on the home screen. Skipped a day? A gentle reminder, never a guilt trip.
7-day trend
−1.4 kg
Streak
0 days · start today
The full toolkit

Every module a personal
trainer actually uses.

Client manager

One profile per client. Goals, plans, notes, photos, and history — all in one tap.

Diet planner

Library, plans, macros — the full nutrition stack with auto-balancing math built in.

Workout builder

Drag-and-drop exercise blocks, set rep schemes, attach video demos for every move.

Scheduler

Book sessions, send reminders, manage recurring slots — with automatic push notifications.

Progress charts

Weight, body comp, strength PRs — charted automatically, exportable for client reviews.

Subscription billing

Tiered plans for your roster size. Auto-renew, cancel anytime, all from inside the app.

Pricing

Pick the plan that
fits your roster.

All tiers include unlimited workout plans, unlimited meal plans, video upload support, basic analytics, and email support. The only thing that changes is how many clients you can run at once.

Starter
Up to 5 clients
$29.99per month
Pro
5–10 clients
$44.99per month
Elite
10–15 clients
$59.99per month
Start with a 14-day free trial on any tier — no card required. Cancel anytime from inside the app.
